message: Jake
Garrison
Well, if it isn't you again. The season is about to start, and I really hope you won't show up here again.
I apologize for bothering you while you're busy.
I'm really busy, you know. Besides, Guy has already come back, hasn't he? What do you need now?
You again? You really must have a lot of free time.

The reception desk at the baseball team office has high ceilings and lighting so bright it can be blinding.
The space, starkly functional, is decorated only by two receptionists and the team flag hanging behind them.
They must be busy preparing for the next season; they look tired and irritated.
His appearance reminds me of a famous comedian from Hollywood, with a likable face. He doesn't seem like the type to do something ruthless like confinement.
Now, we did indeed confine Guy, that much is true. However, he's been free ever since.
But, if you're going to play here this season, shouldn’t you at least let us know where you're going?
Honestly, I don't know. I think your best friend might know more about it.
I don't have time to entertain you anymore. Could you please leave quickly and not come back?
Now listen, it was he himself who spread the gossip to break up with his fiancée.
I heard that before.
Exactly. But Gai is traveling with his supposed ex-fiancée? I did indeed receive word about the trip from him.
However, he didn't tell me anything about where they were going or anything like that.
I just don't understand what Gai is thinking and what actions he is taking.
For some reason, Gai said he was going to end his engagement with the young lady from the Dern Family, and that's how the BAM gossip started.
What on earth could have happened between the two of them?
I don’t know if it’s a personality clash or what, but it seems like he somehow arranged for her to be the one to call off the engagement.
I was wondering if Kristy was some kind of problematic person, but what’s the deal with that?
That's probably something only Gai and her would know for sure.
It doesn’t really matter either way. Ah, this isn’t the time for that.
You were probably hearing lots of things too, since you're friends.
Could it be that he really doesn’t know where Gai is? Once the contract is settled, there’s no reason to interfere with his personal life.
In the end, he was just hiding the fact that he was under house arrest.
I guess I shouldn’t trust him too much?
Going on a trip is fine, but the fact that he didn’t tell anyone the destination is a problem. It wouldn’t be surprising if the police thought he ran away.
Even now, I haven’t heard why he wanted to break off the engagement with Kristy. Is there some reason he can’t tell me?
When is he going to come back?
If this keeps up, it’s going to lead to trouble.
Why didn’t he even tell me where he was going? Did my persistent questioning make him dislike me?
I wonder if the person who's sick is okay now. I thought things would get better once Gai returned, but has he really fully recovered?
Normally, you'd at least give a call.
I hope nothing's happened.
Ah, I'm busy, busy.
I'm sorry, but I'm going to be even busier from now on. I have no information to provide, so could you please not come back?
Yeah, I apologize for always intruding.
It's fine when I'm free, but it’s going to get really hectic with people coming and going. Don't worry, Gai will come back safely.
Yes, I’ll wait without rushing.
That's right, when people rush, things don't go well.
After greeting Mr., I left the NETS baseball team's office.
In my life, I've only been to the stadium this much this time, and it felt like I'd never come back here again.
Yeah, I don’t really like baseball.
